message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the account ending in 1184 with an amount due of 8,400. To continue, please verify your identity using the minimum partial identifier required: confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Understood. I will note that you cannot pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I’m unemployed right now, so I can’t promise anything in the next 21 days.
Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship and cannot commit to payment within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

I understand, but I still can’t commit to any payment right now.

Under Slice policy, no live payment arrangement fits your stated situation because you cannot commit to any payment within 21 days. The only available path is hardship review. I’ve recorded that you cannot commit to a payment right now due to ongoing unemployment/no income. If you want contact only if an approved hardship option becomes available, say that and I’ll note it.
